languages.text: {n}Себериан бережно приподнимает раненую, вглядываясь в осунувшееся лицо своей единственной дочери.{/n} "Тогда я желаю попрощаться с ней, {name}".
{n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан бережно приподнимает раненую, вглядываясь в осунувшееся лицо своей единственной дочери.{/n} "Тогда я желаю попрощаться с ней, {name}".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his only daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."
{n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his only daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."
{n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his true daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."
{n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his true daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安轻轻抱起受伤的女人，凝视着自己女儿那瘦削的脸庞。{/n}“那就容我跟她道个别吧，{name}。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安轻轻抱起受伤的女人，凝视着自己女儿那瘦削的脸庞。{/n}“那就容我跟她道个别吧，{name}。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian levanta amablemente a la mujer herida, mirando el rostro de su hija.{/n} «En ese caso, quiero despedirme de ella, {name}.»
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian levanta amablemente a la mujer herida, mirando el rostro de su hija.{/n} «En ese caso, quiero despedirme de ella, {name}.»

languages.text: {n}Seberian soulève délicatement le corps brisé de sa fille, contemplant son visage émacié.{/n} « Alors, je souhaite lui dire adieu, {name}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian soulève délicatement le corps brisé de sa fille, contemplant son visage émacié.{/n} « Alors, je souhaite lui dire adieu, {name}. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, kızının bir deri bir kemik kalmış yüzüne bakarak yaralı kadını nazikçe kaldırıyor.{/n} "O zaman ona veda etmek istiyorum {name}."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, kızının bir deri bir kemik kalmış yüzüne bakarak yaralı kadını nazikçe kaldırıyor.{/n} "O zaman ona veda etmek istiyorum {name}."

languages.text: {n}Seberian hebt die verwundete Frau sanft hoch und betrachtet das hagere Gesicht seiner Tochter.{/n} "Dann will ich mich von ihr verabschieden, {name}."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hebt die verwundete Frau sanft hoch und betrachtet das hagere Gesicht seiner Tochter.{/n} "Dann will ich mich von ihr verabschieden, {name}."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは傷ついた女を優しく抱き上げ、娘の痩せた顔を見つめた。{/n}「それでは、娘に別れを告げたいと思います、{name}」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian gently lifts the wounded woman, gazing into the gaunt face of his daughter.{/n} "Then I wish to bid her farewell, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは傷ついた女を優しく抱き上げ、娘の痩せた顔を見つめた。{/n}「それでは、娘に別れを告げたいと思います、{name}」
